articles.title: Ex-Patriots captain Kyle Dugger reportedly finds new AFC home
articles.description:
Dugger signed a one-year deal with the Bengals.

The post Ex-Patriots captain Kyle Dugger reportedly finds new AFC home appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kyle Dugger signed a one-year deal with the Cincinnati Bengals.
Dugger previously served as captain for the New England Patriots.
His departure may impact the Patriots' defensive strategy for the upcoming season.

articles.title: Mass. family flies home from vacation to find truck stolen from Logan Airport garage
articles.description:
The truck was reportedly stolen under circumstances eerily similar to another theft that occurred at the same garage just weeks prior.

The post Mass. family flies home from vacation to find truck stolen from Logan Airport garage appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts family returned from vacation to find their truck stolen from Logan Airport garage.
The theft mirrors a similar incident that occurred just weeks prior at the same garage.
Local residents may face increased concerns about vehicle security at Logan Airport.

articles.title: This registered nurse is running Boston for Special Olympics Massachusetts
articles.description:
"There is so much the world tells this community they cannot do because of a diagnosis, but Special Olympics focuses on what athletes can do, and I wish more of the world did that."

The post This registered nurse is running Boston for Special Olympics Massachusetts appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Registered nurse Gabby Peduto is running the Boston Marathon for Special Olympics Massachusetts.
The event highlights abilities of athletes with disabilities, challenging societal perceptions.
Funds raised will support local Special Olympics programs, benefiting Boston's disabled community.

articles.title: North Andover police investigate ‘unauthorized’ social media comment about Kelsey Fitzsimmons case
articles.description:
Police officials say that a former employee used the department's Facebook page to make a "deeply troubling" comment under a post about Fitzsimmons.

The post North Andover police investigate ‘unauthorized’ social media comment about Kelsey Fitzsimmons case appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: North Andover police investigate a troubling comment on Facebook regarding Kelsey Fitzsimmons' case.
A former employee made the unauthorized comment under a police department post.
Residents may feel concerned about police communication and accountability following this incident.

articles.title: The Federal closes in Waltham after 7 years in business
articles.description:
The seafood and steak restaurant, located next to Market Basket, said rising costs made it "impossible to continue.”

The post The Federal closes in Waltham after 7 years in business appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: The Federal restaurant in Waltham closed after 7 years due to rising costs.
Located next to Market Basket, the closure affects local dining options.
Residents may face fewer seafood and steak choices in the area.
